vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

verify.rule: Ensure all specified fields in the schema are included.
Ensure the mass estimate does not exceed the allocated budget.

verify.value: All required features are mapped to geometry operations.
verify.rule: Each required feature must have corresponding geometry operations.

verify.value: Interfaces with adjacent subsystems are clearly defined.
verify.rule: Interfaces should specify the mating geometry and exchange details.

verify.value: Visible locking methods and preload intents are provided.
verify.rule: Critical joints must show locking and preload evidence.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to loose tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement tighter manufacturing tolerances.

risk.desc: Insufficient cooling flow may affect motor performance.
risk.mit: Conduct flow tests to ensure adequate cooling.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure if wing spar loads exceed capacity.
risk.mit: Perform stress analysis on the spar attachment flange.

risk.desc: Inadequate service access could hinder maintenance.
risk.mit: Increase size of service access window.

risk.desc: Threaded connections may strip if not properly preloaded.
risk.mit: Specify correct preload torques for all threaded joints.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Equipment Bay Door, Wing-Spar Reinforcement, Motor Pylon

physics_paths.description: Heat from motor pylon is dissipated through cooling inlet.
Structural loads from wing spars are transferred to pod shell.
Human access to equipment bay door for maintenance.

generated_parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

requirements: Continuous load path from wing to fuselage
Service access for battery and payload

verify.rule: All required evidence features are present.
Mass estimate is within acceptable range.
All parts and features are traceable back to the original design intent.
Interfaces with neighboring subsystems are reciprocal and clearly defined.
Critical joints have visible locking or preload evidence.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex center joint.
risk.mit: Implement detailed assembly instructions and training.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient stiffness leading to structural failure under extreme conditions.
risk.mit: Conduct stress analysis and adjust material properties if necessary.

risk.desc: Possibility of thermal expansion causing misfit between components.
risk.mit: Use materials with similar thermal expansion coefficients.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate clearance for wiring harnesses leading to interference.
risk.mit: Ensure proper clearance and routing paths for all harnesses.

risk.desc: Potential for incorrect fastener torque leading to loosening over time.
risk.mit: Specify torque values and provide tools for accurate application.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path

physics_paths.path: Lift force is transferred through the main spar to the carry-through and then to the fuselage frames.
Power flows from the battery bay through the wing spar to the payload bay.
Heat from sun exposure is dissipated through the CFRP spar to the surrounding air.

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads
manufacturing_strategy.support: Support structures oriented for easy removal
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection of spar socket, anti-rotation key, and center datum

requirements: Provide structural support for the wing airfoil profile.

Integrate control surface cutouts with hinges.

verify.value: All required evidence features are present.

verify.value: Total mass estimated at 180g per rib set.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to varying materials.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal cycling tests to validate material compatibility.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure if load path continuity is compromised.
risk.mit: Perform stress analysis and ensure proper fitting at critical joints.

risk.desc: Battery access may be obstructed if service hatch is improperly aligned.
risk.mit: Include clear alignment guides and conduct fit checks during assembly.

risk.desc: Improper alignment of spar socket could affect overall wing stability.
risk.mit: Use precise manufacturing techniques and conduct alignment verification.

risk.desc: Control surface movement may be restricted if hinge line is not properly designed.
risk.mit: Review hinge design and perform motion simulation tests.

physics_paths.description: Lift forces from airfoil profile are transferred through spar to wing carry-through structure.
Heat generated from sun exposure is dissipated through the wing rib's surface area.
Battery and sensor access via service hatch and cable harnesses.

manufacturing_strategy.support_orientation: Support structures oriented for minimal post-processing
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection for alignment and fit

verification_focus.description: Ensure the total mass does not exceed 200g per rib set.
Verify lift forces are effectively transferred through the spar to the carry-through structure.
Confirm battery and sensor access is unobstructed.
